title: Clinical Psychology
description: Research on psychological difficulties, clinical assessment, diagnosis, and intervention in diverse populations.

title: Mental Health
description: Studies on mental health risk, resilience, prevention, and wellbeing across developmental and social contexts.

title: Psychological Assessment
description: Development and validation of reliable assessment tools for symptoms, functioning, and treatment outcomes.

title: Psychotherapy
description: Evidence-based intervention research focused on mechanisms, process, effectiveness, and clinical implementation.

title: Digital Mental Health
description: Use of digital tools, online programs, and data-informed methods to expand access to psychological support.

title: Cognitive and Emotional Processes
description: Investigation of cognitive, affective, and interpersonal processes relevant to mental health and treatment.
